message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
autonumber

rectangle "HostApp" as HostApp
rectangle "NanoRep" as NanoRep
rectangle "NSURLConnection" as NSURLConnection
rectangle "NSUserDefaults" as NSUserDefaults

HostApp --> NanoRep : (any request)

alt [Check if the session id is stored]
  NanoRep --> NSUserDefaults : fetch the session id
else [Send request for session id]
  NanoRep --> NSURLConnection : 
  NSURLConnection --> NanoRep : session id from server
  NanoRep --> NSUserDefaults : store session id
  NanoRep --> NSURLConnection : keep alive request
  NSURLConnection --> NanoRep : keep alive response
end

NanoRep --> NSURLConnection : (any request)
NSURLConnection --> HostApp : response for the (any request)

@enduml
